title: Hide Your Armor
description: Allows you to cover the armor with glass pane to make it invisible (don't even ask me why it works)
body:
## Invisible armor recipe
Combine any armor with a glass panel

![Invisible armor recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GvIDjyNP/images/dc3db11f33a16267d89471dfe7ad597d9a66b07f.gif)
